title: rosa coriifolia var. dimorphocarpa
intro: Rosa coriifolia var. dimorphocarpa is a variant of the wild rose plant species, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. It contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems, and is also valued for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Rosa coriifolia var. dimorphocarpa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and poultices to support skin health and wound healing.
